sources.cleaned_content:
Q2 Tire

$27.99

Size: 500ml

Achieve the perfect tire shine with our cutting-edge Q2 Tire, the first SiO2-based tire protectant on the market. Unlike conventional tire dressings, our innovative non-sling gel formula delivers long-lasting performance and a natural satin finish that will make your tires look brand new. Its SiO2-based composition ensures durability, making it the best tire shine solution for those who expect nothing but the best for their vehicles.

DURABLE

Q2 Tire is surprisingly durable. When the tires are properly cleaned and Q2 Tire properly applied you can see weeks of performance out of this tire gel. As part of your complete wheel care product, this provides high-quality care. Its ability to penetrate the pores of the rubber ensure long term performance and a healthy satin look.

IMPROVED LOOKS

Q2 Tire does not just create a hydrophobic and self-cleaning finish on the tires, it dramatically improves their looks. If you like a rich satin finish from your tire shine then this is the product for you.

Image: https://i.shgcdn.com/972d6c53-821f-4010-b1aa-d33d09929fff/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/
Image: https://i.shgcdn.com/d75bf89d-2e41-4e8a-918d-7357fb44e4f6/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/

PRO TIP

The super concentrated, SiO2 infused formula of Q Tire requires a very high level of surface preparation. Make sure you clean the tire with Q M TireCleaner and let it dry. Rub a small amount of the product into the surface and let it dry.
TIP: To prolong the durability of Q Tire, heat the surface of the tire wall with a heat gun. This will open the micropores of the rubber and allow the product to soak in. A more matte finish and extended durability are the result.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml / 1 set
DURABILITY: >5 washes

Q2M Tire - Lasting Brilliance for Your Tires

Introducing GYEON Q M Tire, the tire dressing that transcends the ordinary. This advanced formula not only enhances your tires' natural shine but also provides lasting protection against dirt, UV rays, and contaminants.
Elevate your tire care routine and experience the difference that GYEON Q M Tire's long-lasting brilliance brings to your vehicle.
Your tires deserve attention beyond aesthetics, and GYEON Q M Tire delivers. As you apply this formula, you're not only revitalizing the look of your tires but also forming a barrier that shields against environmental factors. The result? Tires that stay fresher and cleaner for extended periods, reflecting your dedication to excellence.
With GYEON Q M Tire, you're not just dressing your tires; you're investing in their well-being and appearance. Elevate your tire care routine and experience the satisfaction of rolling on tires that turn heads and stand the test of time.

Description

Gyeon Q2 Tire 500ml:

QUARTZ BASED

Q2 Tire is the only SiO2-based tyre coating. It guarantees not only durability, but splendid visual effects as well.

HYDROPHOBIC

The ability to repel water and pollution from the surface of rubber is not easy to accomplish, yet more than desirable. Owing to that, even in adverse weather conditions, the tire retains a new look for a long time.

RESTORING

Q2 Tire not only secures tires, it also improves their looks, making the wall seem enamelled, with profoundly vivid colours. The effect even lasts after deterioration of the hydrophobic effect on the tire.

DURABLE

Q2 Tire is brilliantly efficient in repelling dirt and is a product which endures at least a couple of washes. It stays on even when applying water under pressure, while its ability to penetrate into the rubber structure ensures that is keeps its effects visible for a long time.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION:

- Before you start applying, wash the tire (a strong degreaser is recommended).
- Make sure that the surface is clean and dry.

PRECAUTIONS:

- Keep out of reach of children.
- Seek medical attention if swallowed.

PACK CONTENTS: 1x GYEON Q2 Tire 500ml & New Mini Pump Dispenser

Gyeon Q2 Tire 500ml

Brand: GYEON

SKU: 116157

Image: https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116157.jpg?v=1717826335

Description

Q2 Tire is the first and only SiO2-based tire coating, offering not only exceptional durability but also stunning visual effects. Its advanced formula can be layered or heated to extend its longevity, ensuring tires maintain a fresh, factory-new appearance.

Product Features and Benefits

- Provides long-lasting protection for your tires
- Creates a hydrophobic surface that repels water and dirt
- Enhances the color and gloss of your tires
- Protects against UV rays and environmental pollutants
- Easy and safe to apply, with long-lasting results

Gyeon Q2 Tire will leave your tyres with a true deep semi-gloss finish that is not only offers UV protection but is also extremely durable; in fact, results show up to a month or 5 washes before reapplication was required.

Gyeon Q2 Tire is brilliantly efficient in repelling dirt and is a product which ensures at least a couple of washes. It stays on even when applying water under pressure, while its ability to penetrate into the rubber structure ensures that is keeps its effects visible for a long time.

Gyeon Q2 Tire not only protects tires, but it also improves their looks, making their wall seem factory fresh, with profoundly vivid colors. The visual effect lasts even after degradation of the hydrophobicity.

Gyeon Q2 Tire also enhances the color and gloss of your tires, with a sleek and glossy finish that adds depth and shine to your overall vehicle appearance. It's easy and safe application process makes it a popular choice among car enthusiasts and detailing professionals.

Consumption: 10-15ml / 1 set
Durability: >5 washes

How to Use

Step 1: Clean the Tires

Before applying Gyeon Q2 Tire, it's important to make sure that the tires are clean and dry. We recommend using a high-quality tire cleaner and a tire brush to remove any dirt, grime, or brake dust from the surface. Rinse the tires thoroughly and dry them with a clean microfiber towel.

Step 2: Apply Gyeon Tire Cleaner

Apply Gyeon Tire Cleaner to the tire and scrub it with a tire brush until it turns white. Rinse it thoroughly with water and dry it with a clean microfiber towel.

Step 3: Shake the Bottle

Shake the bottle of Gyeon Q2 Tire well before use to ensure that the formula is thoroughly mixed and ready to apply.

Step 4: Apply the Coating

Apply Gyeon Q2 Tire to the tire using a foam applicator pad. Use a small amount of the product and apply it in a thin, even layer. Make sure to cover the entire tire and avoid applying too much product to prevent streaks.

Fast Ceramic Coating for tires

Q2 Tire is the first SiO2-based tire coating introduced to the market, ensuring not only durability but also splendid visual effects. The product can be layered or heated up on the tires to help it absorb into the rubber, extending its long-lasting satin protection.

Q2 Tire is brilliantly efficient in repelling dirt and is a product that ensures at least a couple of washes. It stays on even when washing with a pressure washer. The product not only stays on the surface but penetrates into the rubber and bonds.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml / 1 set

Rubber Restoration

Q2 Tire not only protects tires but also enhances their appearance, making their sidewalls look factory fresh with profoundly vivid look. The darkened richness lasts even after the degradation of hydrophobicity.
It adds moisture back to the rubber, making them supple again. It can also be used to restore and protect weather seals.

Durable Deep Look

The super-concentrated, SiO2-infused formula of Q2 Tire requires a very high level of surface preparation. Make sure to clean the tire with Q2M TireCleaner and let it dry. Rub a small amount of the product into the surface and allow it to dry.
TIP: To prolong the durability of Q2 Tire, heat the surface tire wall with a heat gun. This will open the micropores of the rubber and allow the product to soak in. The result is a more matte finish and extended durability.

Description

GYEON Tire SiO2 Coating 500ml

Advanced quartz technology combined with user friendly characteristics

Q2 Tire is the worlds first and only SiO2-based tyre coating. It guarantees not only durability, but splendid visual effects as well.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml / 1 set
DURABILITY: >5 washes

RESTORES RUBBER

Q2 Tire not only secures tires, it also improves their looks, making the wall seem enameled, with profoundly vivid colors. The effect even lasts after deterioration of the hydrophobic effect on the tire.

DURABLE

Q2 Tire is brilliantly efficient in repelling dirt and is a product which endures at least a couple of washes. It stays on even when applying water under pressure, while its ability to penetrate into the rubber structure ensures that is keeps its effects visible for a long time.

ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS

Before you start applying, wash the tire (a strong degreaser is recommended). Make sure that the surface is clean and dry. To increase durability, heat after application with a heatgun or hairdryer. Keep out of reach of children. Seek medical attention if swallowed.

FAQ

How long does it last?
When properly applied (we recommend two coats), it will last up to 10 washes, translating to 2-3 months of durability.

Is it shiny, satin or matte?
GYEON Tire will produce a satin finish but can be further buffed down to a light satin. It will dull down over time to a deep matte finish.

What's the difference between Tire and Tire Express?
Tire Express is water-based and can be applied while the tires are still wet. It's meant to be used as a 'fast dressing' and does not require preparation as thorough as GYEON Tire. Tire Express can also be used on other rubber surfaces, such as weather seals, to restore and protect them.

Will it sling?
No, it will not sling. The reason why something will sling is if too much product is applied without buffing it down. Also, ensure there are no products in the tire treads; make sure those are cleaned up as well.

Anything else I need to know?
A little goes a long way; just a few drops of GYEON Tire can coat an entire tire. You can also use this on other rubber pieces, such as weather seals, to rehydrate and protect from cracking.
TIP: The product can be applied thick on tires and left to soak in for a few hours before coming back to level it off.
